reviews.comment:
Hola buenas noches, si cargué combustible, buena atención. Un muchacho en moto con otro de acompañante se adelantó a la fila para cargar combustible en un bidón y el vendedor lo ubicó en la fila. Gracias..!!

(Translated by Google)
Hello, good evening. Yes, I filled up with fuel; the service was good. A young man on a motorcycle, with a passenger, went ahead of the line to fill a jerrycan with fuel, and the attendant helped him into line. Thank you!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11264551123214888728/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcTlHdExnEAE
